In Schedule I to the said Aegi (a) in Part I relating to “MAMMALS”, after entry 43, the following entry shall be inserted, namely :7 “44. Ilog Deer (Am porcinm)"; (b) in Part III relating to "BIRDS", the word "Cal/DCIIIIIIflA‘iphngu" in the entry 19 shall be omitted, 2. In Schedule II to the said Act, in Part II, the entry 5 shall be omitted, 3. In Schedule III to the said Act, the entry 11 shall be Omitted, 4‘ In Schedule IV to the said Act:~ (a) In entry 11. for item 57 and entry relating thereto, the followmg item and the entry shall be substituted. namely : » “57. Quails (Pharimdae)-except Calurnix faporiica (Japanese Quails) of farm bred variety"; (b) after entry 15, the following entry shall be inserted, namely :7 “IS-A, I‘okay gecko (Kick/w geclm)". [F. No. l-lS/2013-WL] Dr. S. S. GARBYAL, Addl. Director General of Fcrests (WI 4) and Director.
